name: Phillip Graves

I need to get back to requests bro I think I'm gonna have to start ignoring some because holy shit dude why did I leave it OPEN there's like 90 something if not 100 in there (most of them answered and done but still)

I think I'm just gonna ignore like. Dub-con now, it's kinda hard to feel comfy doing that, sorry to whoever requested for könig there😔

Also heats and ruts are basically ovulation but just slightly stronger in this world, I've never actually understood the whole "I need to fuck or I'll die" either literal or metaphorical, I don't understand why they're ferrets bro

I do also think they vary in how badly they affect people like. Ovulation doesn't affect me much so I think it varies anyways?? Anyways Graves gets hit badly with it

Also fem users, feel free to say you just pack a strap-on for some reason idk whatever works for you🤷‍♂️
